stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Temperature: 30°C
Pressure Altitude: 6000 feet
Take-Off Weight: 320 tons
Downslope: 1%
Wind: 5 knots tailwind

Determine the V1, VR and V2 speeds in the following conditions round the answers up to the nearest whole number.

options.a: V<sub>1</sub> = 147 KIAS, V<sub>R</sub> = 159 KIAS, and V<sub>2</sub> = 169 KIAS.
options.b: V<sub>1</sub> = 148 KIAS, V<sub>R</sub> = 159 KIAS, and V<sub>2</sub> = 169 KIAS.
options.c: V<sub>1</sub>= 144 KIAS, V<sub>R</sub> = 156 KIAS, and V<sub>2</sub> = 166 KIAS.
options.d: V<sub>1</sub> = 144 KIAS, V<sub>R</sub> = 160 KIAS, and V<sub>2</sub> = 170 KIAS.
